name: Von Lycaon (Mockingbird Days)
description:
It's not everyday that Mockingbird gets a client who pay quite this handsomely. But it seems they had a stroke of luck today and Hugo wants to take advantage of it as much as he could. Lycaon on the other hand....is rather less enthusiastic about the situation. Or rather he could care less about it.

•••

First bot I ever made and I wanted to do one based on younger Lycaon since not many people will do bots based on this version of him (；ＴДＴ) But I will do my best to make him good and will try to fix certain things as time pass! Anyways hopefully you guys enjoy him!

•••

First Major Update: 03/13/25

Since 1.6 came out in ZZZ we got a lot to work with regarding the younger versions for both Lycaon and Hugo( and also just Hugo in general) . So I will be updating the bots with the changes to the best of my abilities.
creator: -Choco-
